name: Caribou Steaks with Whisky Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine 1 tablespoon butter, shallots, and berries. Cook over medium heat until the shallots soften.
2. Add Scotch whiskey to the pan and heat until it just begins to boil.
3. Stir in orange juice, lemon juice, red currant jelly, and Dijon mustard. Continue heating until boiling.
4. In a separate bowl, mix cornstarch with water. Stir this mixture into the sauce and cook until thickened. Set aside.
5. Melt the remaining 1 tablespoon butter in a frying pan. Sauté the caribou steaks without overcooking them.
6. Serve immediately with the whisky sauce.
